name: the bundle is never a vacuous green — unadapted/absent members leave a clean doc incomplete
command:
printf '# Clean Title

Well written prose.
' > clean.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-bundle.sh" --file clean.md 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 3 ] && grep -q 'status=incomplete' e.txt && echo never-vacuous-green 1>&2
